content:
<act>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Deliver the owner task by improving semantic recursive documentation for Qwen, Minecraft, Windows, Japan, United States topics while maintaining neutral multi-state progress tracking.</objective>
<constraints>Neutral multi-state progress tracking; evidence completeness before tool mutation; prevent blocked-step failures from repeated graph.recover attempts</constraints>
<assumptions>docs/qwen-minecraft-windows-japan-united-states.md exists and contains the target documentation content</assumptions>
<risks>First owner message is not a sufficient plan -> record graph.plan before mutating tools; missing document-structure audit may block completion</risks>
<steps>1. Collect observation evidence from docs/qwen-minecraft-windows-japan-united-states.md via fs.read; 2. Record structured plan with required fields and confidence bounds; 3. Execute document-structure audit via doc.audit on root=structured-output; 4. Build artifact scaffold using fs.batch_write for failed topology files; 5. Verify semantic consistency across all documentation artifacts</steps>
<checks>plan completeness, evidence sufficiency, document structure validity, semantic consistency</checks>
<paths>docs/qwen-minecraft-windows-japan-united-states.md</paths>
<reason>Recovery phase requires structured plan before any tool mutation to ensure evidence completeness and prevent blocked-step failures from repeated graph.recover attempts. The target file exists at the expected path based on fs.list observation.</reason>
</act>
